title: Strategos AI
subtitle: The 48 Laws of Power RAG Oracle
description: Strategos AI is a high-performance, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system built to provide wise, contextual, and practical strategic counsel based on Robert Greene's The 48 Laws of Power. Features a luxurious glassmorphic Next.js interface with step-by-step pipeline animations and a fast Python Streamlit wrapper.

title: Squish Test Agent
subtitle: Autonomous GUI Test Authoring Agent
description: A production-grade local autonomous AI system that scans existing Squish test suites (steps, object maps, utilities) and generates executable Gherkin feature files and Python step definitions from plain English requirements.

title: Resolve Pal
subtitle: Full-Stack Multi-Agent Support System
description: A full-stack support orchestration system using the Supervisor Multi-Agent Pattern. Routes and processes incoming tickets dynamically, delegating specialized billing or technical work to LLM agents with tool calling.
